cases.title: In Re Korean Southwest Orange County Presbytery
cases.synopsis: The SJC issued a citation to Korean Southwest Orange County Presbytery to appear at the March 2022 Stated Meeting unless it provided satisfactory written responses to part (d) of the RPR Report from the 2021 General Assembly review of the Presbytery's records. The citation was approved unanimously 22-0-0.

cases.title: Speck v. Missouri Presbytery
cases.synopsis: TE Ryan Speck complained that Missouri Presbytery clearly erred by declining to find a strong presumption of guilt against TE Greg Johnson on four allegations arising from Johnson's involvement in the 2018 Revoice Conference and his public statements on same-sex attraction. The SJC denied the complaint 16-7, finding it was not unreasonable for Presbytery to conclude Johnson's explanations on all four allegations—sinfulness of SSA, identity in Christ, sanctification, and above-reproach qualifications—were satisfactory under BCO 31-2, with seven dissents and two concurring opinions.
